---
title: "marine_genomics"
author: "CaterinaPalma"
date: "2026-07-07"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
#Set options, housekeeping
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  include = TRUE,
  message = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE)
```

## Information 

#### Terminal 
... is commands for interacting with actual computer e.g. moving files, looking at content of files. 

#### Console 
...is commands ONLY for R code. 

## What do these commands mean? 

- "ls" command tells us what is present in our current directory. 
- "ls -l" command tells us the long format, every single item in the current directory (I prefer this). 
- "cd" = changes directory  
- "mkdir" = makes a new directory folder 
then when i command "ls" again, it shows all the items again, now including the new directory folder. 
- "pwd" = shows you where you are, which folder/directory you are working in.
